name: Reactive Chemical Storage Infrastructure Upgrade
description:
The Green Valley Water Facility (Colchester, VT) has upgraded its Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) storage infrastructure for safety compliance. You must update the facility's chemical inventory to reflect these changes.

Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (which is already installed/open), import or open the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s. Navigate to the Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) chemical record and make the following updates:

1. Update the Maximum Daily Amount to 90,000 lbs.
2. Delete the old storage location (the existing 'East Wing Drum Storage' or similar ambient drum location).
3. Add a NEW storage location with the following exact details:
   - Location: 'Tank Farm B, AST-104'
   - Container Type: 'Aboveground tank'
   - Pressure: 'Greater than ambient pressure'
   - Temperature: 'Less than ambient temperature'

After making these updates, save and export the updated submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\chlorine_storage_updated.t2s.
